title: DataForge Knowledge Entry
description: Structured knowledge unit produced by researcher agents (df-researcher-library, df-researcher-domain, df-researcher-role) and merged into the live KB. Multiple entries make up a *.live.md file in ~/.claude/dataforge/knowledge/.

id.description: Stable id for dedupe and citation, e.g. 'sklearn-1.5-set_output-pandas'

summary.description: 1-3 sentences describing the technique, API change, or insight

area.description: KB namespace this entry belongs to (e.g., 'sklearn', 'finance', 'ml-engineer')

expires_at.description: Optional explicit expiry; otherwise the area's TTL applies

kind.description: Type of knowledge — used by the merge step to surface deprecations and pitfalls in the freshness gate

deprecation_replaces.description: If kind=deprecation, the symbol/API that this replaces. Used by pre-codegen-freshness hook.

applies_to_versions.description: Library version range this entry applies to (e.g., '>=1.5,<2.0')
